name: allen-carr-easy-way-quit-vaping
description: John Dicey's adaptation of 'Allen Carr's Easy Way to Quit Vaping' — the world-famous Easyway method applied to vape and nicotine addiction, helping users quit without willpower, substitutes, or fear by understanding and dismantling the nicotine trap.
useCase: Quit vaping permanently using the Allen Carr Easyway method — without willpower, nicotine substitutes, or fear — by understanding the nicotine trap and the illusion of pleasure.
knownRisks: The Easyway method contradicts mainstream medical advice on nicotine replacement therapy
Not a substitute for professional medical treatment for severe addiction
Individual results vary — some people may need additional support
